institutions.name: University of Yaounde I
institutions.description: After obtaining my GCE Advanced Level, I needed a guidance to choose the right course and find my part. I did Chemistry course in this particular university for one year and I wasn't really fun of it

institutions.name: Higher Institute of Science Technology and Ethics
institutions.description: After one year at University of Yaounde I, I decided to change my university and look for a better opportunity. I joined the Higher Institute of Science Technology and Ethics and did Computer Science for two years specially the Industrial Computing course. During the intership for the preparation for my BTS, I acquired the skills of IT supports that helps me till today for my computer troubleshooting.

institutions.name: Siantou Higher Institute
institutions.description: After two years at Higher Institute of Science Technology and Ethics, I decided to change my university to continue my third year Industrial Computing course. I joined the Siantou Higher Institute and together with the intenship done in Globetech SARL, I've acquired more skills in IT especially the electronic troubleshooting skill.

institutions.name: Primetec Academy
institutions.description: I joined Primetec Academy to start a new IT course which is Network Administration and Security. I've acquired more skills in IT especially the network administration and security skills in two years.

certificates.name: HTML Basics
certificates.description: This certificate validates the ability to create and structure web content using HTML, the standard markup language for building web pages.

certificates.name: CSS Basics
certificates.description: This certificate validates the ability to style and layout web content using CSS, the language for describing the presentation of web pages.

certificates.name: JavaScript Basics
certificates.description: This certificate validates the ability to add interactivity and dynamic behavior to web pages using JavaScript, the language for web development.

certificates.name: Full Stack and Frontend Development
certificates.description: This certificate validates the ability to build and maintain web applications using both frontend technologies like HTML, CSS and JavaScript together with backend technologies.

certificates.name: Introduction in CyberSecurity
certificates.description: This certificate validates the ability to understand and apply fundamental cybersecurity concepts, principles, and practices to protect information systems and data.

certificates.name: Network Defense
certificates.description: This certificate validates the ability to implement and manage network security measures to protect against unauthorized access and cyber threats.

certificates.name: Network Addressing and Troubleshooting
certificates.description: This certificate validates the ability to configure and troubleshoot network addressing and connectivity issues to ensure reliable network operation.

certificates.name: Network Support and Security
certificates.description: This certificate validates the ability to provide network support and security services to protect against cyber threats and ensure network reliability.

certificates.name: Network Devices and Configuration
certificates.description: This certificate validates the ability to configure and manage network devices to ensure secure and reliable network operation.

certificates.name: Ethical Hacker
certificates.description: This certificate validates the ability to identify and exploit vulnerabilities in systems and networks from an ethical perspective to help organizations improve their security posture.
